result.stdout:
Description:
  Calculate your .Net project code lines

Usage:
  CodeLines.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  init     Init project direcctory
  scan     Scan and calculate lines of code count
  history  Show scan history
  ignore   Manage ignored files

commands.payload:
Description:
  Calculate your .Net project code lines

Usage:
  CodeLines.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  init     Init project direcctory
  scan     Scan and calculate lines of code count
  history  Show scan history
  ignore   Manage ignored files

result.stdout:
Description:
  Show scan history

Usage:
  CodeLines.Cli history [options]

Options:
  -p, --path <path>  Path to project directory [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-codelines-1.0.1-a1467d9554514fa787d607b78f0af4f1]
  -l, --last <last>  History entries to show
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage ignored files

Usage:
  CodeLines.Cli ignore [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  add <pattern>     Add ignore pattern to .clineIgnore
  remove <pattern>  Remove pattern from .clineIgnore
  list              Show ignore patterns

result.stdout:
Description:
  Add ignore pattern to .clineIgnore

  CodeLines.Cli ignore add [<pattern>] [options]

  <pattern>  Directory or file pattern

result.stdout:
Description:
  Scan and calculate lines of code count

Usage:
  CodeLines.Cli scan [options]

Options:
  -p, --path <path>  Path to project directory [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-codelines-1.0.1-a1467d9554514fa787d607b78f0af4f1]
  -d, --diff         Show difference with previous scan results
  -v, --verbose      Detailed output
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information
